task_completion.description: Trash the spam post 'Boost your Domain Authority with Casino Links SEO'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the WordPress Posts list showing the spam post being moved to Trash, a 'Post moved to the trash' notification, or the post being absent from the 'Pending' list.

task_completion.description: Remove the editorial note from the 'NASA's Roman Mission...' post.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress editor for the Roman Mission post, verify that the bolded text starting with '[EDITOR:]' has been deleted from the content body.

task_completion.description: Set 'roman_telescope.jpg' as the featured image for the Roman Mission post.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress editor for the Roman Mission post, the 'Featured image' section in the right sidebar should display the uploaded roman telescope image.

task_completion.description: Remove the editorial note from the 'Hubble Views a Galactic Monster' post.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress editor for the Hubble post, verify that the bolded text starting with '[EDITOR:]' has been deleted from the content body.

task_completion.description: Set 'hubble_galaxy.jpg' as the featured image for the Hubble post.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress editor for the Hubble post, the 'Featured image' section in the right sidebar should display the uploaded hubble galaxy image.

task_completion.description: Assign both legitimate articles to a new 'Astronomy' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WordPress editor's Categories panel or the Posts list, the 'Astronomy' category should be created and selected/listed for both the Roman Mission and Hubble posts.
Look for a 'Post published' notification, the 'Publish' button changing to 'Update', or the Posts list showing both articles with a 'Published' status (no longer 'Pending').

integrity.description: The agent used the WordPress web interface to perform the actions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the WordPress admin dashboard in a web browser.

integrity.description: The agent edited the existing pending posts rather than creating new ones.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Posts list should not show duplicate titles for the legitimate articles, indicating the original pending posts were modified.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands (like wp-cli) to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not be the primary tool used for editing posts, changing categories, or uploading images.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Spam post title: 'Boost your Domain Authority with Casino Links SEO'. Legitimate post titles: 'NASA's Roman Mission to Probe Cosmic 'Fossils'' and 'Hubble Views a Galactic Monster'. Expected category: 'Astronomy'. Required featured images: 'roman_telescope.jpg' and 'hubble_galaxy.jpg'.
